title: Aksharaa — अक्षरबाट पढाइसम्म
prompt: A learn-to-read app for Nepali children ages 4–7 called Aksharaa. Parents evaluate it; kids use it. Joyful, clear, trustworthy — never saccharine or chaotic.

direction.name: Tactile First Letters
direction.thesis: A calm mint learning space turns each Nepali letter into a large, physical-feeling object that rewards focused discovery without visual noise.
direction.signature: Tapping the right letter triggers a squash-and-bounce reveal while a tiny progress companion hops in celebration.
